narrative:
Coventry Twp D (precinct in Summit County) has 934 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
